name: HTML Mail

suggests.drupal/echo: Render the message body as a fully-themed webpage using the selected theme.
suggests.drupal/emogrifier: Inline CSS as a post-filter for consistent display in webmail/mobile.
suggests.drupal/pathologic: Rewrite relative URLs to absolute as a post-filter.

lifecycle_note: Installed release is 4.0.0-beta2 (pre-stable). API and config are usable but the 4.0.x branch has not reached a stable release.

notes.mail_plugin: Provides the '@Mail' plugin 'htmlmail' (class Drupal\htmlmail\Plugin\Mail\HtmlMailSystem). On install, hook_install() registers it in system.mail 'interface' as key 'htmlmail' and sets mailsystem.settings defaults.sender/formatter to 'htmlmail'. Uninstall reverts to 'php_mail'.
notes.theming: Emails are themed via Twig templates using the theme hook 'htmlmail' with suggestions htmlmail__{module} and htmlmail__{module}__{key}. Default template templates/htmlmail.html.twig; override by copying into the selected Email theme's templates/ dir.
